things.name: Yalong Bay National Resort District
things.description: China's finest beach - 7km of white sand with five-star hotels

things.name: Tianya Haijiao (End of the Earth)
things.description: Legendary granite rock formations on the sea - traditional rendezvous of lovers

things.name: Nanshan Buddhist Culture Park
things.description: 108m Guanyin statue standing in the sea - one of the world's tallest Buddha statues

things.name: Monkey Island (Nanguang)
things.description: Island sanctuary for thousands of free-roaming macaque monkeys

things.name: Dadonghai Beach
things.description: Sanya's most accessible beach with beach bars and Chinese family tourism culture

things.name: Wuzhizhou Island Diving
things.description: Crystal water, coral reefs and abundant marine life 40 minutes by boat

things.name: Li and Miao Cultural Village
things.description: Traditional villages of Hainan's indigenous Li and Miao ethnic minorities

things.name: Mission Hills Golf Resort
things.description: World's largest golf facility with 12 championship courses

things.name: Sanya Bay Night Market
things.description: Evening seafood market with fresh fish, lobster and tropical fruits

things.name: Wenchang Chicken
things.description: Hainan's most famous dish - free-range chicken with coconut rice and dipping sauces
